title: Add option to jump to TODAY when selecting dates in timeline
excerpt: When selecting dates in the timeline we need an option to jump to today so we’re not scrolling forward or backward to change dates.  Our project template has historical dates as this is the way we were guided to set it u…

posts.author: EricaW (Erica Weinberg)
posts.cookedHtml: When selecting dates in the timeline we need an option to jump to today so we’re not scrolling forward or backward to change dates. Our project template has historical dates as this is the way we were guided to set it up with dependencies.
